title: Always build out-of-source
description: Configure and build in a dedicated build directory so generated artifacts never mix with tracked source files.
body: Use whenever configuring a project. Do not run cmake in the source directory itself. Actions: create a separate build directory; run cmake -S . -B build; build with cmake --build build; add the build dir to .gitignore. Validation signals include a source tree that stays free of CMakeCache.txt and object files, and a clean rebuild after deleting the build directory. Risk boundary: an in-source configure scatters generated files that can shadow a clean build and are easy to commit by accident, so guard against it and remove stray artifacts if found.
